titleStmt.title: SII 15.100: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 100. (B.K. No. 194 of 1928-29.) AṆṆĪGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the prākāra of the Amṛitēśvara temple.

This is dated the 5th regnal year of the king, [Vishu], śu. 14, Monday, Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkramaṇa. The name of the month is lost. According to the Saṅkramaṇa the date corresponds to 1161 A.D., June 26, Monday. But the tithi would be ba. 2 in the month of Adhika-Āshāḍha.

Bijjaḷa who is praised for his valour, is referred to as Bhujabalachakravarti and Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara. It registers a gift of land at Aṇṇigeṟe to the god Amṛitēśvara of the excellent Dakshiṇa-Vāraṇāśi Tīrtha, by Daṇḍanāyaka Śrīdharayya. One of the gifts was meant for reciting the Purāṇa in the temple. Aṇṇigeṟe is described as rājādhāni-paṭṭaṇa. The inscription is badly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
damaged
śrī bijjabhūpāḷakaṁ . kanda . Anatārātinṛpāḷaraninituṟadāṁtikki saṁda jayalakṣmige tāniniyanene pe
¨rmmeyiṁ neṭṭane bhujabaḷa cakrava¨rtri negaḻdhaṁ bijjaṁ . vinatō¨rvvīśvara na¨rkkaṟiṁ nilisi māṟau
ṁnya bhūpāḷaraṁ vanadhiprāṁtamaneyde tūḷdu baḷadiṁ niṣkaṁṭakaṁ tānideṁbine bhūpa
diḷīpanapratimaśau¨ryyaṁ tāḻdidaṁ viśvamēdiniyaṁ neṭṭane tanna bāhubaḷadiṁ bijjakṣamā pāḷakaṁ . svasti
samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suva¨rṇna vriṣabhadhvajaṁ
ḍamarugatū¨ryyani¨rgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷa[cu¨ryya]kuḷakamaḷamā¨rttaṁḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍaṁ mānakanakācaḷaṁ

kaṁṭhīravaṁ . paranārīsahōdaraṁ ka nāmā
disamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī rā
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi prava¨rddhemānamā
pajīvi . śrī
dhātrinivāsa baṁdhura
pīyūṣanirākarapratima
ṇaratnaratnākarana vaṁśāvatāra
vyābhāsapū¨rṇna
tibrata jāyābhi
¨rkkyamahimaṁ daṁḍādhipaṁ śrī
citadikṣu cayaṁ
saukhyaṁ khyātivetti¨rddaṁ
kaṁ . rāṇugicamūpana
raṇaguṇaṁ gī¨rvvāṇa maṁtri siddhugi mahānubhā
nāgaladēviyu . mana
va¨rttiya rājyaṁ tiyarā
tidēvi payōruha
viśruta patibrata santati
nā ḷu .
guṇayuta siddhugīsana
nīrajamitraṁ tāna kali tāne
va . Aṁtu vaṁśābhyudayadiṁdeseda siddhugi daṁḍanāthana lakṣmīkānte
boppadēva kṣitinuta bhīvaṇacamūpaṁ vipraku ba¨rmmayyanaṁ
bivakaraṇaṁgaḷuṁ . va . Antu tadīya baṁdhuvenasida sidu gidaṁḍa
duṁnati vāgvidyābaladuṁnati dānadha¨rmmōṁnati taṁnnoḷne
yoḷu . bāppukuvaraṁge dhātrīja
vitaraṇaṁ vinōdadiṁdesadippaṁ . va . Āta
spadaṁ tannūtnaratnadoṁ ṇamideṁbude
maggaderājadhāni bittaripudu nō¨rppaḍe
śōbhākaramā dakṣiṇado
śrīvanitage lakṣmī
piriduṁ kaṇgeḍḍamāgetteluṁ
śvaradēva pādārādhakarappa samasta sāsi¨rvvaroḷu
mahīdharedhai¨ryya¨rvvinuta
dhātriyoḷu . va .
śōbhānikētanameni mā sthānadoḷu . vri
māna dharaṇīta do
suti¨rppam® śrīviḷāsanilayaṁ . śrī
nijabhujabaḷacakrava¨rtti tribhuvanamalla bijjaṇadēvava¨rṣada 5 neya viṣu saṁva
suddha 14 nē sōmavāra dakṣiṇāyana saṁkramaṇa vyatīpāta daṁdu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ
he¨rggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīdharayyaṁgaḷu puṁṇyatithiyaṁdu śrīma drājadhānipaṭṭaṇavaṇni
vara bijjagāvuṇḍanaḷiya neṟeyaṁmagāvuṇḍana sthaḷa doḷage yaṇni geṟeya gaḍiṁ
ḷayallida te bijjagāvuṇḍanaḷiyaneṟeyamagāvuṇḍana kayyalu dra
rassaraṁ dhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi paṁcōttara sahita māṟugoṁḍu divya tithiyoḷu
kṣiṇavāraṇāsi divyatī¨rtthadamṛtēśvaradēva¨rgge vyatīpātadalu raṁgapūjege dhārāpū
ḷu paṁcōttarasahitaṁ māṟugoṁḍu biṭṭa mattaru haṁneraḍu 12
sōmayūjiyara putra mādhava dēvabhaṭṭōpādhyā yaru Avara putra
dāsabhaṭṭōpādhyāya¨rgge śrīmadamṛtanāthadēvaralli purāṇava hēḷu
ttiyogi paṁcōttarasahita sa¨rvvabādhāparihāravāgi koṭṭa mattaru
madamṛtēsvara dēvaratottu caitrada pa¨rvvadalu māḍu
kke śrīdharayyadaṇḍanāyakaru mārugoṁḍu sa¨rvva namaśya dēhuta vṛ
ttaru 12 mattaru mūvattā sīmākrama mentendaḍe .
keyyiṁ baḷiya keyyiṁ paḍuvalu Amṛtēśvaredēvara
tana gēṟiyiṁ
tussīme . yī dha¨rmmamaṁ nāḍanāḷdarasugaḷuṁ
vāraṇāsi gayeyeṁbī tī¨rtthagaḷūḷagaṇita
daru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrā
